headline: Aflac Incorporated to Present at the Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference
summary: Aflac Incorporated (NYSE: AFL) announced today that President of Aflac Incorporated and Aflac U.S. Virgil R. Miller, along with Senior Executive Vice President and Aflac Incorporated Chief Financial Officer Max Brodén, will participate in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference on June 9, 2026 at 10:30 a.m. ET.
